timeline.summary: Diagnosis: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE). Found 3 similar cases with successful outcomes. Treatment: Initiate corticosteroid therapy and monitor regularly.

details.recommended_treatment: Initiate corticosteroid therapy and monitor the patient regularly for joint symptoms and overall health improvements.
